name: Red Ronin
short_description: Red Ronin is a Turn-based but fast paced dash 'n slash game where a bloodthirsty ronin and her companion bot search for revenge.

About the Game

[/url] [b]WHAT IS RED RONIN?[/b] One by one, turn by turn, kill all of them! [imgvid poster.avif="" webm="" mp4="" width="634" height="280"][/imgvid] Red Ronin is a Tactical Turn-based but fast paced dash 'n slash game where a bloodthirsty ronin and her companion bot searches for revenge. [b]STORY[/b] After being betrayed by her former team, Red embarks with her companion bot ISAAC in a non stop revenge journey to eliminate everyone who left her behind. [imgvid poster.avif="" webm="" mp4="" width="744" height="298"][/imgvid] [b]KEY FEATURES[/b] [list][*]5 hours of turn-based combat through several handcrafted levels[/list] [list][*]Turn-based but fast paced unique combat system and open ended puzzles[/list] [list][*]Unveil and follow Red's revenge plot[/list] [list][*]Think before every move or slash everything in your way[/list] [imgvid poster.avif="" webm="" mp4="" width="744" height="282"][/imgvid] A turn-based puzzle game turned into a stylish hack 'n' slash game (or vice versa). [imgvid poster.avif="" mp4="" webm="" width="744" height="280"][/imgvid

WHAT IS RED RONIN?

One by one, turn by turn, kill all of them!



Red Ronin is a Tactical Turn-based but fast paced dash 'n slash game where a bloodthirsty ronin and her companion bot searches for revenge.

STORY

After being betrayed by her former team, Red embarks with her companion bot ISAAC in a non stop revenge journey to eliminate everyone who left her behind.




KEY FEATURES

  • 5 hours of turn-based combat through several handcrafted levels
  • Turn-based but fast paced unique combat system and open ended puzzles
  • Unveil and follow Red's revenge plot
  • Think before every move or slash everything in your way





A turn-based puzzle game turned into a stylish hack 'n' slash game (or vice versa).
